Package neqsim.process.safety.depressurization

package neqsim.process.safety.depressurization
  • Related Packages
    Package
    Description
    neqsim.process.safety
     
  • Classes
    Class
    Description
    BlockedOutletOverpressureAnalyzer
    Screening analyser for the MORE PRESSURE / blocked-outlet overpressure HAZOP deviation.
    BlockedOutletOverpressureAnalyzer.BlockedOutletResult
    Result of a blocked-outlet overpressure screening run.
    DepressurizationSimulator
    Transient depressurization (blowdown) simulator for pressurized vessels.
    DepressurizationSimulator.DepressurizationResult
    Time-series result of a depressurization run with API 521 acceptance flags.
    DynamicBlowdownFlareStudyDataSource
    Governed input package for dynamic blowdown, PSV sizing, and flare-load studies.
    DynamicBlowdownFlareStudyDataSource.BlowdownSource
    One protected equipment source connected to blowdown or relief disposal.
    DynamicBlowdownFlareStudyDataSource.Builder
    Builder for DynamicBlowdownFlareStudyDataSource.
    DynamicBlowdownFlareStudyDataSource.SourceBuilder
    Builder for DynamicBlowdownFlareStudyDataSource.BlowdownSource.
    DynamicBlowdownFlareStudyHandoff
    Versioned handoff package for governed dynamic blowdown and flare-load studies.
    DynamicBlowdownFlareStudyHandoff.Builder
    Builder for DynamicBlowdownFlareStudyHandoff.
    DynamicBlowdownFlareStudyRunner
    Readiness-gated dynamic blowdown, PSV sizing, and flare-load study runner.
    DynamicBlowdownFlareStudyRunner.Builder
    Builder for DynamicBlowdownFlareStudyRunner.
    DynamicPsvSizingStudy
    Dynamic pressure-safety-valve (PSV) sizing study for a fire-exposed gas-filled vessel.
    DynamicPsvSizingStudy.SizingComparison
    Result of a steady-versus-dynamic PSV sizing comparison.
    LineEquipmentListEvidence
    Source-traceable line and equipment list evidence for dynamic blowdown and flare studies.
    LineEquipmentListEvidence.Builder
    Builder for LineEquipmentListEvidence.
    LineEquipmentListEvidence.EquipmentItem
    One extracted equipment-list row.
    LineEquipmentListEvidence.LineItem
    One extracted line-list row.
    MultiVesselBlowdownStudy
    Coupled simultaneous blowdown of multiple vessels into a shared flare/disposal header per API 521 §7.
    MultiVesselBlowdownStudy.MultiVesselBlowdownResult
    Aggregated result of a simultaneous multi-vessel blowdown study.
    NonEquilibriumBlowdownModel
    Non-equilibrium (two-temperature) blowdown model for a fire-exposed pressurized vessel.
    NonEquilibriumBlowdownModel.NemResult
    Time-series result of a non-equilibrium blowdown run.
    PsvValveModel
    Pressure-safety-valve (PSV) model with API 520 open/close hysteresis.
    STS0131AcceptanceCriteria
    Acceptance criteria for STS0131-style fire escalation screening of blowdown results.
    STS0131AcceptanceResult
    Result from evaluating a depressurization run against STS0131 acceptance criteria.
    VesselFillingSimulator
    Transient filling (charging) simulator for pressurized vessels.
    VesselFillingSimulator.VesselFillingResult
    Time-series result of a vessel filling run with liner temperature-limit flags.
